programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep108: Behind-The-Scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting
programme.desc: Hot Water goes behind-the-scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep211: Nova Scotia, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores the history Nova Scotia with a to-the-centimetre replica of the “Hector”, checks out the oldest Yacht Club in the Americas and then goes Tidal Bore Rafting.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep107: Maui, Hawaii - USA
programme.desc: Adventures on Maui include ATV riding at Kahomo Ranch, watching Cirque Polynesia, sailing on Teralani, enjoying the Wailele Polynesian Luau and having fun at Mulligans/Willie K.

programme.title: Shark Encounters in the Deep
programme.desc: Hand-feeding and “flipping” Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas, diving with Great Whites near Mexico’s Guadalupe Island, learn how to put sharks into a relaxed state known as “Tonic Immobility”, enabling sharks to serve as camera operators.

programme.title: Lost In Tasmania
programme.desc: Lost In Tasmania takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! We travel with local surfer Mikey Brennan as he and friends explore the secluded East Coast of Tasmania, the Tasman Peninsula and famed Shipstern Bluff where they find incredible scenery and epic waves.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep108: Behind-The-Scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting
programme.desc: Hot Water goes behind-the-scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep211: Nova Scotia, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores the history Nova Scotia with a to-the-centimetre replica of the “Hector”, checks out the oldest Yacht Club in the Americas and then goes Tidal Bore Rafting.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: K2 Snowboarding Presents: Jumbo Easy
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Dopamine
programme.desc: Dopamine is a naturally occurring chemical produced by the human brain, which controls movement and reward. In the world of progressive snowboarding, the joy of physical movement and the reward of being outside are the two greatest factors motivating riders to evolve and innovate. The Absinthe Films documentary Dopamine captures professional snowboarders pushing boundaries and chasing storms across the Chilkats, Valhallas, Monashees, Dolomites, and Pyrenees mountains.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Week 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third week of the Sunshine Tour. We are getting hyped to see what Javier Trenor has prepared for us in the Junta de Andalucia Grand Prix as the CSI4* action begins, and with 400 young horses participating this time, action is secured. This is the last clear round for some riders to qualify for the Young Horse Finals held next week. Are you ready?

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Hong Kong Polo vs Hamburger Polo Club
programme.desc: The ultimate polo club competition at an international level has arrived to the Polo Club of Chantilly. In this first event, Hong Kong Polo is face to face against Hamburger Polo Club for the Polo Rider Cup. Who will win this game? Find out now in the full competition of the clash between Hong Kong Polo vs Hamburger Polo Club.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to The Polo Show. The program about the most spectacular horse events all around. Adrenaline and glamour combined with great speed and passion are part of the first episode of the season. We travel around the United States, Thailand and Dubai discovering the latest polo events happening. Let's share the journey!

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 2
programme.desc: Today we bring you some of the highlights from the season finale in the USA as well as the start of the season in England. We are also going to take a look at the action from Italy and France. Join us on a worldwide polo journey across all continents and discover this passionated sport that is linked in many countries to royalty.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 2 - Strzegom
programme.desc: Great Britain might have won the first leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup, but Strzegom is a new opportunity for the other teams to shine. Poland has started with a 128.8 team point lead, but Germany is following closely on 135.0. Who will be the winning team?

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 3 - Le Pin au Haras
programme.desc: Le Grand Complet, the third leg of the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup series is being celebrated in Le Pin au Haras, Normandy. Known as the Versailles for Horses, it provides a fitting location for spectacular competition. Germany is fresh from victory at Strzegom, but France is not ready to lose in home grounds. How will this leg develop?

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the calm of the Red Sea's underwater realm. Watch colorful fish and fascinating sea creatures as they move through the coral reefs, accompanied by the peaceful sounds of the ocean, perfect for relaxation, sleep, or meditation.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: Experience the peaceful night on Hawaii's Big Island with a full moon lighting up the coast. Relax to soothing ocean waves and nature sounds, perfect for deep sleep and tranquility.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Bring the Vancouver Aquarium to life on your screen! Witness the stunning diversity of marine life and vibrant fish, accompanied by peaceful music and the graceful movement of seaweed. This calming video lets you relax and escape into the wonders of the ocean.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking
programme.desc: Do you know where in the world the last untouched glacier is? Where is the highest and the smallest waterfall? Which desert is the driest or the largest? Would you like to know where the most inaccessible mountains, the lowest point of the oceans or the great salt deserts are? This series offers all the answers.In the first episode, we discover breathtaking glaciers in Argentina, infinite plane in the middle of Europe, thermal miracles of Hungary, stalactite caves protected by UNESCO and the most active volcano in New Zealand – White island.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E01 - Riggins Gold
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the mighty Salmon River, doing some underwater metal detecting, looking for gold nuggets.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E02 - Blue Bucket Oregon Trail

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing

programme.title: It Works In Reverse
programme.desc: God chose you. In “It Works In Reverse,” Pastor Steven Furtick explains that God shows us what we’re chosen for as we move forward in faith.

programme.title: Old Roots New Fruits
programme.desc: In “Old Roots New Fruits,” Pastor Holly Furtick reminds us that if we’re rooted in Christ, we can find hope even in the places where we feel stumped.

programme.title: God Prompts
programme.desc: We often ask God to do what we want, but faith starts with doing what He says. When you trust God as your good Father and follow His prompting, even small steps can unlock something big.

programme.title: This Is Then
programme.desc: Some things look “stupid” to the world… until God uses them to change everything. If you’ve been holding back because you need everything to make sense, this will call you to trust what God promised and practice gratitude in the hard place.

programme.title: Say Yes to Simple
programme.desc: In “Say Yes To Simple,” Holly Furtick of Elevation Church reveals simple, practical ways to face our toughest situations.

programme.title: Win Before You Begin
programme.desc: Winning starts long before the battle does. When your thoughts are grounded in God’s truth, fear loses its hold and peace takes its place. You walk in victory when you let God’s Word shape how you see your situation.

programme.title: New Number Same Name
programme.desc: If you’re looking at what’s next and feeling nervous, remember this: What God has done in your life is only the foundation, not the finish line. He’s a creative God, still at work in ways you’re not expecting. Let go of your plan so God can show you His purpose.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: At nightfall, commissioner DAZA tries to arrest Clara Inés for identity theft, Nicolás defends him.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul makes it clear to Santiago that they are not celebrating, but when he sees that Adriana is accompanying the lawyer, he cannot control his jealousy.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César Román wishes happiness to the newlyweds, but Santiago - the discordant note - toasts to a happiness that lasts until Salvatore Perroni destroys them in court.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel tries to abuse Camila, a gloved hand hits him. Everyone blames Camila and she defends herself saying she did not see the murderer. Torrealba insists on interrogating her. Everyone: Octavia, Astrid, Max, Marcelina, Leandro, Gregorio and even Sebastián had motives to kill Ezequiel. Only Max is arrested, as the presumed perpetrator of the crime.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max is arrested and Camila assures that he is innocent. Santiago tells the inspector that he saw Max cleaning the object with which Ezequiel was killed and, sadly, he concludes that he and Camila were the perpetrators. The interrogations continue.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In a love surrender, Victoria and Nicolás promise to love each other forever and renounce everything that could disturb their happiness. Now that she is expecting Nicolás' child, Florencia will not allow Victoria to get in the way of their marriage and so she lets Adelaida know, who throws her out of her house while Hilario cannot believe that his beloved is expecting another man's child. Nicolás assures Florencia that he is responsible for their child, but he can no longer be tied to her. Nicolás visits Victoria to express his decision to stay with her and his son because he can no longer be tied to Florencia, but Victoria lets him know that she cannot accept to take him away from the woman who is expecting his child.

programme.title: OEA NEWS / UCL NEWS DIARIO
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: NOTICIERO UNICANAL
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Reto Sangriento
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes investigadores de fenómenos paranormales reciben el reto de pasar un fin de semana en una casa donde habitan seres malignos. Esto con el fin de presentar las evidencias en su programa de televisión y levantar el rating, pero lo que no saben es que el reto les costara muy caro.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: El Peluquero Romántico
programme.desc: La vida del barbero de barrio Víctor transcurre bastante tranquila. Mantiene una estricta rutina diaria tanto en el trabajo como en casa, donde pasa las noches junto a su madre escuchando boleros o viendo películas de la Época de Oro del Cine Mexicano en la televisión. Su rutina se ve alterada cuando su madre muere repentinamente. Su coqueteo con una joven camarera y su reencuentro con una antigua novia no pueden llenar el vacío dejado por su madre. Sin embargo, eso cambia cuando un día un hombre que dice ser su padre entra repentinamente a la tienda. El encuentro lo llevará a un viaje inesperado y que le cambiará la vida a Río de Janeiro.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny son imigrantes indocumentados, un dia el patrón de Jenny trata de abusar de ella, Mickey lo sorprende y lo mata haceindo justicia por su propia mano así se desatan una cacería de criminales abusadores, todo lo sueben a las redes convirtiéndose en los anti-héroes más populares por hacer justicia a los desamparados.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
